name: Ollama OpenAI-Compatible Server
description: Run an Ollama container and register its local OpenAI-compatible endpoint with Rasputin.
tradeoffs: model pull is handled by Ollama, not by Warsat
performance depends on the model and host acceleration
notes: Use a model name that Ollama can serve, such as llama3.2 or qwen2.5-coder.
Warsat starts the server container; model downloads still happen through Ollama workflows.
The registered endpoint uses the OpenAI-compatible /v1 API.
Keep Ollama data in local ignored data storage.
